mnemonics.title: TLS Handshake Steps
mnemonics.content: CHILL: ClientHello, HelloRetryRequest (optional), ServerHello, Intermediate messages, Let client finish, Launch encrypted data

acronyms.usage: Used in TLS 1.3 for combined encryption and integrity

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a three-step handshake: 1) Exchange keys (handshake), 2) Verify identities (ID check), 3) Seal envelope (encryption)

analogies.analogy: Like a diplomatic pouch: sealed envelope (encryption) with tamper-evident seal (MAC) delivered by verified courier (certificate)
